scripts.build: pnpm -F @tenkit/template-generator build && pnpm -F @tenkit/cli build && pnpm -F create-tenkit build
scripts.test: pnpm -F playground test && pnpm -F @tenkit/template-generator test && pnpm -F @tenkit/cli test
scripts.check: pnpm test && pnpm typecheck && pnpm lint && pnpm smoke
scripts.pack:dry-run: pnpm -F @tenkit/template-generator pack:dry-run && pnpm -F @tenkit/cli pack:dry-run && pnpm -F create-tenkit pack:dry-run
scripts.typecheck: pnpm -F playground typecheck && pnpm -F @tenkit/template-generator typecheck && pnpm -F @tenkit/cli typecheck && pnpm -F create-tenkit typecheck
